title: Tenderly Cooked Tuscan Chestnut Pasta
description: A light and silky Italian dish featuring cooked chestnut, cooked to a perfect al-dente finish.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the chopped shallots and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until softened.
Add the tuscan seasoning and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cooked chestnuts to the skillet and toss to combine with the garlic and shallot mixture.
Add the chopped parsley to the skillet and toss to combine.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss to combine with the chestnut mixture.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
If using white wine, add it to the skillet and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until the liquid has reduced.
Transfer the pasta to a serving dish and top with grated parmesan cheese.
